description: While healing another Survivor, both you and the healed Survivor gain the Elusive Status Effect. When you finish healing the Obsession, they gain the Elusive Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by -100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: A Place For Us

description: All regular Items you retrieve from a Chest come equipped with 1 to 2 Add-ons. First Slot: 100 % chance of an Add-on of Visceral Rarity or lower. Second Slot: {percentage}% chance of an Add-on of Uncommon Rarity or lower. Prevents attached Add-ons on your currently held Item from being consumed upon escaping the Trial.
name: Ace in the Hole

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, you are healed to the next Health State and gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. Can be used while Exhausted and ignores an existing Status Effect. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds after use.
name: Adrenaline

description: You see the Auras of the {value} most recent Survivor(s) that you rescued from a Hook, healed, or who did the same for you. They also see your Aura. Resets when you are hooked by the Killer.
name: Aftercare

description: Whenever the Killer performs the Break or Damage action, their Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Alert

description: The Auras of dropped Pallets in the environment are revealed to you. While standing next to a dropped Pallet, press and hold the Active Ability button to reset it to its upright position over {duration} seconds.
name: Any Means Necessary

description: The Auras of broken Pallets are revealed to you within {range} metres. After unlocking or rummaging through 2 Chests, you gain a special ability: while standing next to the location of a broken Pallet, press and hold the Active Ability button for 4 seconds to rebuild it as a Fragile Pallet. Fragile Pallets instantly break when dropped.
name: Apocalyptic Ingenuity

description: Start the Trial with 4 Tokens. While standing next to an unlocked and empty Chest, press and hold the Interaction button to Rummage: retrieves an extra Item from that Chest, consuming -1 Token (limited to twice per Chest). Rummaging speed is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Appraisal

description: Succeeding a Skill Check while healing another Survivor grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. Suppresses Great Healing Skill Checks. Good Healing Skill Checks grant Healing progress based on Tokens: 0 Tokens: -15 %. 1 Token: +0 %. 2 Tokens: +15 %. 3 Tokens: +30 %. 4 Tokens: +45 %. 5 Tokens: +60 %. Inactive when healing with a Med-Kit.
name: Autodidact

description: Whenever you unhook another Survivor, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds. For {duration} seconds, the unhooked Survivor's Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood are suppressed and the strength of their Haste Status Effect is increased by +10 %.
name: Babysitter

description: Whenever the Killer picks up any other Survivor in the Dying State, Background Player activates for 10 seconds. While active, starting to run grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 5 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds after use.
name: Background Player

description: After completing 20 % worth of Generator repairs, press the Active Ability button next to a Window to install a Trap that stays active for up to {duration} seconds. The Trap triggers when the Killer vaults the Window, causing them to suffer from a -50 % Hindered Status Effect for 6 seconds. Deactivates after triggering or once the timer runs out. The Auras of Trapped Windows are revealed to all Survivors in yellow.
name: Bada Bada Boom

description: While falling from height, all noises related to falling and landing are suppressed and the duration of the Stagger upon landing is reduced by -75 %. Grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds after use.
name: Balanced Landing

description: Press the Active Ability button while standing and motionless to enter a Performance that lasts up to 15 seconds, empowering other Survivors within 16 metres. The empowering effect depends on a d20 roll and lasts 90 seconds after completing the Performance: 1: you scream (but without notifying the Killer). 2–10: Skill Checks grant +1 % Progression. 11–19: Skill Checks grant +2 % Progression. 20: Skill Checks grant +3 % Progression. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds after completing or cancelling the Performance.
name: Bardic Inspiration

description: While repairing any Generator, its Aura is revealed to all Survivors and highlighted in yellow. Whenever the Killer downs another Survivor while you are repairing, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Better Together

description: Completing a Healing action on another Survivor increases their Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, Healing, and Unlocking by {percentage}% until they receive damage again.
name: Better than New

description: When healing yourself or another Survivor, all noises related to Healing and Grunts of Pain are suppressed, Failed Healing Skill Checks do not trigger a Loud Noise Notification, and the Penalty is reduced to {percentage}% of the total Progression.
name: Bite the Bullet

description: After repairing Generators for the equivalent of 40 % of Progression, Blast Mine activates. While active, press the Active Ability button next to a Generator to install a trap with a countdown of {duration} seconds. The trap trips half-way through the Killer attempting to damage the Trapped Generator, stunning the Killer for 4 seconds and blinding all Players within 12.5 metres. Deactivates after its countdown elapses or it is tripped. The Auras of Trapped Generators are revealed to all Survivors in yellow.
name: Blast Mine

description: When either you or the Obsession become injured, your Auras are constantly revealed to one another. Completing a Healing action on the Obsession, or having them complete one on you, grants both a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect for as long as you remain within 16 metres of one another. Temporarily disabled if you are the Obsession. Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by -100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Blood Pact

description: After being unhooked by any means, Blood Rush activates for {duration} seconds. While active, press the Active Ability button to instantly recover from an existing Exhausted Status Effect. Does not cause the Exhausted Status Effect. Deactivates prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action. Deactivates after use and is disabled for the remainder of the Trial once the Exit Gates are powered.
name: Blood Rush

description: While being carried by the Killer, the strength of the Struggle Effects on the Killer from your Wiggling is increased by {percentage}% and the Killer cannot read the Auras of Hooks within 16 metres. If the Killer drops from height, you gain +33 % of your current Wiggle progression upon landing.
name: Boil Over

description: The Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Bond

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes and benefit from its Boon Effects: Altruistic Healing speeds are increased by {percentage}% when not using a Med-Kit; if a Survivor is injured, their Aura is revealed to all other Survivors. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Boon: Circle of Healing at a time. Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all effects are active on the same Boon Totem.
name: Boon: Circle of Healing

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes and gain a +3 % Haste Status Effect. The effect lingers for {duration} seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range. Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all effects are active on the same Boon Totem.
name: Boon: Dark Theory

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes and benefit from: Recovery speed while in the Dying State is increased by {percentage}%, and the Self-Recovery ability is unlocked, allowing them to fully recover from the Dying State. Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all effects are active on the same Boon Totem.
name: Boon: Exponential

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes and benefit from: the Auras of all Chests and Generators are highlighted to you in blue, and your Action speeds for Blessing and Cleansing are increased by {percentage}% while you have a lit Boon Totem. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Boon: Illumination at a time. Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all effects are active on the same Boon Totem.
name: Boon: Illumination

description: Press and hold the Active Ability button on a Dull or Hex Totem to bless it and create a Boon Totem. Survivors within 24 metres hear soft chimes and benefit from: Scratch Marks are suppressed and Auras are hidden from the Killer. Both effects linger for {duration} seconds after leaving the Boon Totem's range. Only one Totem can be blessed by your Boon Perks at a time and all effects are active on the same Boon Totem.
name: Boon: Shadow Step

description: Whenever you unhook another Survivor, the duration of their Endurance Status Effect is extended by {duration} seconds to {duration2} seconds, and the duration of their Haste Status Effect is extended by +10 seconds to 20 seconds. Endurance is cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action of any kind.
name: Borrowed Time

description: Your Healing speed is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Botany Knowledge

description: Whenever the Killer reads your Aura, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for the same duration. Your Action speeds for Cleansing, Healing, and Repairing are increased by {percentage}%. If you are the Obsession, every 30 seconds your Aura is revealed to the Killer for 3 seconds. Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Bound by Obsession

description: After you are unhooked by any means, the Hook is instantly broken and its Auto-Repair timer increases to 180 seconds. The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Breakdown

description: While within 5 metres of the Killer carrying another Survivor, you gain a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect and the Wiggling speed of the carried Survivor is increased by +25 %. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Breakout at a time.
name: Breakout

description: While healing a dying Survivor, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you both. After completing the Healing action, for {duration} seconds the other Survivor's Scratch Marks are suppressed and they gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect. Does not cause the Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Buckle Up

description: While hiding inside a Locker with a depleted Item equipped, after {duration} seconds the Item is recharged: first time to 99 %, second time to 66 %, third time to 33 %. Disabled for the remainder of the Trial after triggering its effect for the third time.
name: Built to Last

description: Nearby Crows no longer fly off and alert others to your presence unless you come within touching distance. Suppresses the urge to scream from any cause at all times. Suppresses all noises related to interacting with Chests and Totems. Reduces the Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, and Unlocking by {percentage}%.
name: Calm Spirit

description: If you are hooked and enter the Struggle Phase, as soon as any Survivor comes within 16 metres of your Hook the Struggle Phase timer is paused for {duration} seconds.
name: Camaraderie

description: While shining a Flashlight, you gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect. After blinding the Killer by any means, the Killer suffers from a -20 % Hindered Status Effect for 6 seconds (does not stack). Applies a cool-down of {duration} seconds after blinding the Killer.
name: Champion of Light

description: Start the Trial with 2 Tokens. While hiding inside a Locker and holding a non-event Toolbox, press the Active Ability button to spend 1 Token and transform your Toolbox into a Med-Kit of the same rarity with a random Add-on of the same rarity. The new Med-Kit has {duration} seconds of charges.
name: Change of Plan

description: After repairing Generators for a total of 20 %, press the Active Ability button near a dropped Pallet to install a Trap that stays active for {duration} seconds. When the Killer breaks the Trapped Pallet, the Trap explodes and the Killer suffers from a -50 % Hindered Status Effect for 4 seconds. Deactivates after triggering or once the timer runs out. The Auras of Trapped Pallets are revealed to all Survivors in yellow.
name: Chemical Trap

description: After cleansing or blessing a Totem, Clairvoyance activates. While active, press and hold the Use Item button when empty-handed to reveal the Auras of Chests, Exit Gate Switches, Generators, the Hatch, and Hooks within 64 metres for as long as you hold the interaction, up to a maximum of {duration} seconds.
name: Clairvoyance

description: After completing a Healing action on another Survivor, Clean Break activates. Press the Active Ability button while being healed by another Survivor to suffer from the Broken Status Effect and be automatically healed 1 Health State after {duration} seconds. Cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State. Does not activate if you already suffer from Broken. Deactivates after healing you.
name: Clean Break

description: After unhooking a Survivor, while crouched and stationary, press the Active Ability button to suppress the creation of Grunts of Pain, Pools of Blood, and Scratch Marks for all injured or dying Survivors within 24 metres of your location for the next {duration} seconds. You scream and reveal your Aura to the Killer for 5 seconds.
name: Come and Get Me!

description: After having completed a Healing action on another Survivor, whenever you are in the Dying State Conviction activates. While active, press the Active Ability button after reaching at least 25 % Recovery progress to unlock the Self-Recovery ability (fully recover from the Dying State), inflict the Broken Status Effect, and automatically re-enter the Dying State after {duration} seconds.
name: Conviction

description: Start the Trial with {tokens} Token(s) and succeeding a Great Skill Check grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. While any other Survivor performs a skilful interaction, any Failed Skill Check is converted into a Good Skill Check, consuming -1 Token. The Aura of that Survivor is revealed to you for 6 seconds. Does not apply to special Skill Checks.
name: Corrective Action

description: Your Cleansing speed is increased to 125 %. Whenever you cleanse a Totem, your Cleansing speed is increased by a stack-able +25 %, and the Aura of the Totem farthest from your location is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Counterforce

description: After performing a Rushed Vault action while being chased, all noises related to Rushed Vault actions (including the Loud Noise Notification) are suppressed for {duration} seconds. Performing another Rushed Vault action while active resets the timer. Has a cool-down of 45 seconds after use and the timer has elapsed.
name: Cut Loose

description: When performing a Rushed action to vault a Window or exit a Locker, your Scratch Marks are suppressed for 5 seconds. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Dance With Me

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds once they come within 24 metres of your location. Deactivates after use.
name: Dark Sense

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: After being unhooked by any means, Dead Hard activates. While injured and running, press the Active Ability button to gain the Endurance Status Effect for 0.5 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Dead Hard

description: Whenever you are in the Injured State, the Odds of triggering Skill Checks while repairing or healing are increased by {percentage}%, Skill Checks appear in random places, and the penalty for missed Skill Checks is reduced by -50 %.
name: Deadline

description: Press and hold the Sprint button while interacting with a Locker: your Scratch Marks and Pools of Blood are suppressed for 5 seconds, you run past the targeted Locker instead of entering it, its doors swiftly open and close (feigning entry), and a Loud Noise Notification triggers at its location. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Deception

description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, Will to Live activates for {duration} seconds. When grabbed or picked up by the Killer, succeed a Skill Check to stab the Killer and escape their grasp, stunning the Killer for 4 seconds. You become the next Obsession. Deactivates once the Exit Gates are powered. Disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use. Deactivates prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action. Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Will to Live

description: The Auras of the 3 Generators currently in closest proximity to one another are revealed to you. Your Repair speed on those Generators is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Deja Vu

description: After safely unhooking another Survivor, Deliverance activates: grants the ability to perform a successful Self-Unhook at any point during the first Hook Stage. Causes the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds after unhooking yourself. Cannot be used during the second Hook Stage or if you are hooked as the Last Survivor Standing. Disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use.
name: Deliverance

description: Whenever any Survivor (including yourself) is not in the Healthy State, your Action speeds for Healing and Unhooking are increased by a stack-able {percentage}% per injured, dying, or hooked Survivor, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%.
name: Desperate Measures

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, the Auras of Chests, Generators, and Totems within {range} metres of your location are revealed to you for 20 seconds.
name: Detective's Hunch

description: Start the Trial with 1 Token. Whenever the Killer attempts to read your Aura, Distortion consumes -1 Token: your Aura is blocked from being read and your Scratch Marks are suppressed for {duration} seconds. Recharges +1 Token every 15 seconds of being chased by the Killer, up to 2 Tokens. Does not trigger while in the Dying State.
name: Distortion

description: After staying in the Terror Radius without being chased for {duration} seconds, Diversion activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while crouched and motionless to throw a pebble in the direction you are facing. It lands 20 metres away and creates a distraction: triggers a Loud Noise Notification and creates fake Scratch Marks. Deactivates after use.
name: Diversion

description: When healing another Survivor, your Altruistic Healing speed is increased by {percentage}% per Hook Stage they have accumulated, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. The Progression bonus of Great Healing Skill Checks is increased by +3 % per Hook Stage, up to a maximum of +6 %.
name: Do No Harm

description: Whenever you are at full health, Dramaturgy activates. While active, press the Active Ability button while running to run with knees high for 0.5 seconds, then gain a +25 % Haste Status Effect for 2 seconds (primary effect). Afterwards, one of the following secondary effects triggers (never the same one twice in a row): a second instance of the primary Haste; the Exposed Status Effect for 12 seconds; you scream; or you receive a random Rare Item with random Add-ons (dropping any previously held Item). Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Dramaturgy

description: While healthy, taking a Protection Hit grants all other Survivors within 12 metres of your location a +25 % Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Duty of Care

description: Each time a Survivor other than yourself is killed or sacrificed, Down to the Last gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 3 Tokens: grants a stack-able radius of {range} metres per Token around you, up to a maximum of {range2} metres, within which you are immune to the Killer's Aura-reading abilities. When you are the Last Survivor Standing, your Repair speed is increased by +75 % and your Gate and Hatch Opening speeds are increased by +50 %. Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Down to the Last

description: Your Altruistic Healing speed is increased by {percentage}%. Whenever any other Survivor is injured, your Aura is revealed to them as a potential Healer.
name: Empathic Connection

description: The Auras of injured or dying Survivors are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Empathy

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. Extends the duration of every Killer Aura reveal to you by +2 seconds. Benefits from its own effect.
name: Eyes of Belmont

description: Whenever a Survivor other than yourself is hooked, Fast Track is granted {tokens} Token(s), up to a maximum of 9. Succeeding a Great Repair Skill Check consumes all accumulated Tokens, permanently reducing the Repair Charges requirement of that Generator by 2 charges per Token.
name: Fast Track

description: Whenever you are healthy, your Vaulting speed for a Fast Vault is increased by +20 %. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds after performing a Fast Vault.
name: Finesse

description: While being chased by the Killer or inside the Killer's Terror Radius, Pallet Drop interactions are 50 % faster and the Auras of the 5 closest Pallets and Windows are revealed to you. Goes on a {duration} second cool-down when you drop a Pallet.
name: Five Moves Ahead

description: Your Walking speed is increased by {percentage}%. Unlocks the ability to see your own Scratch Marks.
name: Fixated

description: After repairing Generators for a total of {percentage}%, press the Active Ability button while hiding inside a Locker to craft a Flash Grenade. Deactivates after use.
name: Flashbang

description: Recovering in the Dying State also charges the Wiggle Meter at 50 % of the Recovery rate, up to a maximum of {percentage}% of Wiggle Progression.
name: Flip-Flop

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, gain +1 Token, up to 5. For each Token: Bless and cleanse Totems {percentage}% faster; Heal {percentage2}% faster; Unhook Survivors {percentage3}% faster.
name: Flow State

description: While repairing Generators, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds after succeeding a Great Repair Skill Check.
name: Fogwise

description: While healthy and healing another Survivor without a Med-Kit, press the Active Ability button to trade 1 Health State with them: instantly heals them to the Injured State (if dying or suffering from Deep Wound) or to full health (if injured). You become injured and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for {duration} seconds, and become the Killer's Obsession if not already. Reduces your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by -100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: For the People

description: Each time you complete a Generator together with at least one other Survivor, the Repair speed of all participating Survivors (including yourself) is increased by +5 % for {duration} seconds.
name: Friendly Competition

description: While suffering from the Exhausted Status Effect, your Scratch Marks disappear +50 % faster and your Recovery rate from that Status Effect is increased by {percentage}%. Does not cause the Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Ghost Notes

description: After unlocking a Chest and either blessing or cleansing a Totem, the urge to scream from any cause is suppressed and the Aura of the Killer is instead revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Hardened

description: After hiding in a Locker for 3 seconds, Head On activates. While active, hold the Sprint button while exiting the Locker to launch yourself out, stunning the Killer if they are within 2.5 metres for 3 seconds. Triggers a Loud Noise Notification for the Killer upon missing. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds on a successful stun.
name: Head On

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, you gain a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Hope

description: Succeeding a Great Skill Check while repairing or healing grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of 6 Tokens. Skill Check Trigger odds and Pointer-Rotation speed are increased by +4 % per Token each, up to a maximum of +24 %. The Skill Check Bonus progression is increased by {percentage}% of its base value per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Loses all Tokens after succeeding just a Good Skill Check, failing one, or if the action is interrupted.
name: Hyperfocus

description: Grants the ability to see the Scratch Marks of other Survivors. Whenever another Survivor loses a Health State due to the Killer, the Killer's Aura is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Inner Focus

description: After cleansing a Totem of any kind, Inner Strength activates. Hiding inside a Locker for {duration} seconds heals you to the next Health State. Deactivates after use. Cannot be used while suffering from the Broken Status Effect.
name: Inner Strength

description: When in the Basement near the circle, press the Active Ability button to begin the Invocation (60 seconds to complete). During an Invocation, your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors, who can join in (+100 % speed with an Invocation Perk equipped, +50 % without). Once completed, whenever the Killer scares a Crow while a Survivor is inside their Terror Radius, the Killer's Aura is revealed to all Survivors for {duration} seconds. You automatically enter the Injured State from any previous Health State and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows

description: When in the Basement near the circle, press the Active Ability button to begin the Invocation (60 seconds to complete). During an Invocation, your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors, who can join in (+100 % speed with an Invocation Perk equipped, +50 % without). Once completed, the Repair Charges requirement of all Generators in the Trial is permanently reduced by {value} Charges. You automatically enter the Injured State from any previous Health State and suffer from the Broken Status Effect for the remainder of the Trial. Completing this Invocation disables all other instances of Invocation: Weaving Spiders for the remainder of the Trial.
name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders

description: While injured, the volume of your Grunts of Pain is reduced by {percentage}%. Cannot be used while Exhausted, but does not cause the Status Effect.
name: Iron Will

description: Whenever any Survivor is hooked, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to all Survivors whenever they come within {range} metres of the Hook. If you are the hooked Survivor, the Auras of all Survivors are revealed to each other. Otherwise, the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed only to you.
name: Kindred

description: After staying in the Terror Radius without being chased for {duration} seconds, Last Stand activates. Performing a Rushed Vault action stuns the Killer for 3 seconds if they are within 2.5 metres of that Vault location. Disabled for the remainder of the Trial after use.
name: Last Stand

description: All other Survivors within 10 metres of your location have their Action speeds for Cleansing, Gate-Opening, Healing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, and Unlocking increased by {percentage}%. The effect lingers for 15 seconds after leaving its Area of Effect. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Leader at a time.
name: Leader

description: Once you are the Last Survivor Standing, the Aura of the Hatch is revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Left Behind

description: Whenever you are healthy, the sound of your footsteps while running is suppressed. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds after performing a Rush Vault action.
name: Light-Footed

description: Reduces the Lifetime of your Scratch Marks by {duration} seconds. Reduces the Spawn chance of patches of Scratch Marks by -60 %, making their spacing inconsistent.
name: Lightweight

description: Whenever you perform a Rushed Vault action, you gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Lithe

description: Whenever you are the only Survivor not currently incapacitated by being downed, carried, or hooked, your Grunts of Pain, Pools of Blood, and Scratch Marks are suppressed for {duration} seconds. Deactivates after use and only accounts for Survivors still participating in the Trial.
name: Low Profile

description: Whenever you are in the Injured State, your Pools of Blood and Scratch Marks are suppressed for up to {duration} seconds. While healing another Survivor, Lucky Break recharges by the same amount of time spent, up to its initial maximum. Deactivates once its timer runs out or your Health State changes.
name: Lucky Break

description: While hiding inside a Locker, your Grunts of Pain are suppressed. After exiting the Locker, for 30 seconds your Grunts of Pain and Pools of Blood are suppressed, the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you, and the Aura of the nearest Generator is highlighted to you in yellow. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Lucky Star

description: Whenever you are in the Injured State, Made for This activates. While active, completing a Healing action on another Survivor grants you the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds (cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action). While active and suffering from the Deep Wound Status Effect, running grants a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect.
name: Made for This

description: After triggering a third Protection Hit by any means, Mettle of Man activates: while in the Injured State, it shields you from the next attack that would put you into the Dying State. After healing back to full health, your Aura is revealed to the Killer whenever you are farther than {range} metres from them. Deactivates after entering the Dying State. Increases your chance of becoming the initial Obsession by +100 %. The Killer can only be obsessed with one Survivor at a time.
name: Mettle of Man

description: After repairing Generators for a total of 20 %, press the Active Ability button next to a Chest, Exit Gate, Generator, or Totem to spawn a Static Illusion that lasts for {duration} seconds. Deactivates after triggering.
name: Mirrored Illusion

description: After performing the Unlocking or Rummaging action on Chests a total of 2 times, Moment of Glory activates. When you become injured, you instantly suffer from the Broken Status Effect and are automatically healed 1 Health State after {duration} seconds. Cancelled prematurely if you enter the Dying State. Does not activate if you already suffer from Broken. Deactivates after healing you.
name: Moment of Glory

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: You suffer permanently from the Broken Status Effect in exchange for: suppressed Pools of Blood, suppressed Grunts of Pain while in the Injured or Dying State, and the Self-Recovery ability (fully recover from the Dying State). Recovery speed is increased by {percentage}%.
name: No Mither

description: Once the Exit Gates are powered, the Auras of all other Survivors are revealed to you. Your Action speeds for Healing and Unhooking are increased by {percentage}%. The strength and duration of the Haste Status Effect granted to Survivors you unhook is increased by +10 % and +5 seconds: they gain a 20 % Haste Status Effect for 15 seconds.
name: No One Left Behind

description: After being unhooked or unhooking yourself, for {duration} seconds your Aura is blocked from being revealed, your Grunts of Pain while injured and your Scratch Marks are suppressed, and you gain the Endurance Status Effect (cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action). Deactivates prematurely and is disabled for the remainder of the Trial upon powering the Exit Gates.
name: Off the Record

description: While standing and idle, press the Active Ability button to start a Performance (up to 15 seconds) that empowers Survivors within 16 metres and triggers continuous Skill Checks. After successfully completing the Performance, for 90 seconds empowered Survivors performing Healing or Repairing actions have a +20 % increased chance of triggering Skill Checks. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds after cancelling or completing.
name: One-Two-Three-Four!

description: All Survivors have the radius of all Aura-reading abilities increased by {range} metres. Only affects Auras that emanate from the Survivor causing them. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Open-Handed at a time.
name: Open-Handed

description: Whenever you enter the Injured State from full health, the duration of the On-hit Sprint boost is extended by +2 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Overcome

description: After cleansing or blessing a Totem, your Repair speed is increased: Dull Totem: {percentage}%. Hex Totem: {percentage2}%. Deactivates after losing a Health State.
name: Overzealous

description: After stunning the Killer by any means, your Grunts of Pain, Scratch Marks, and Pools of Blood are suppressed for {duration} seconds.
name: Parental Guidance

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: While unlocking a Chest, Unlocking speed is increased by {percentage}% and the audible range of all noises related to unlocking is reduced by -12 metres. Guarantees an Emergency Med-Kit after completing the interaction.
name: Pharmacy

description: Whenever you are in the Injured State, press the Active Ability button while crouching and stationary to silently enter the Dying State without notifying the Killer. Your Grunts of Pain and Pools of Blood are suppressed, and the Self-Recovery ability is unlocked with Recovery speed increased by +25 %. After self-recovering from the Dying State, you are instantly healed to full health and gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Disabled after recovering by any means, but can be reactivated once upon powering the Exit Gates.
name: Plot Twist

description: The Auras of closed Chests, Items sitting inside opened Chests, and Items dropped in the environment are revealed to you within {range} metres. When unlocking or rummaging through Chests, the chance of finding rarer Items is increased by +50 %.
name: Plunderer's Instinct

description: Whenever a Generator is completed, your Scratch Marks are suppressed for {duration} seconds. Whenever you start repairing a Generator for the first time, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds.
name: Poised

description: While repairing a Generator, press the Active Ability button to Store Potential Energy: Repair Charges no longer progress the Generator and are instead converted into Tokens (1 Token per 1 % Progression, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens). Failed Repair Skill Checks incur a penalty: not at Token limit, reduces accumulated Tokens by -20 %; at Token limit, regresses the Generator by -10 %. Having accumulated at least 1 Token, press the Active Ability button again on the same or a different Generator to Release Potential Energy: consumes all accumulated Tokens and instantly progresses that Generator by +1 % per Token. Deactivates after use or losing a Health State (losing all accumulated Tokens in the latter case).
name: Potential Energy

description: While in the Dying State, the Auras of upright Pallets are revealed to you. After reaching {percentage}% of Wiggle progression, press the Active Ability button while being carried by the Killer near a nearby Pallet to drop it, stunning the Killer and causing them to release you. Deactivates after use.
name: Power Struggle

description: Projects an invisible cone in the direction you are looking, with a Detection angle of 45 ° and a range of 36 metres. Triggers an audio cue when detecting the Killer within it. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Premonition

description: Your Repair speed is increased by a stack-able {percentage}% per other Survivor within 4 metres of your location, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%. Extends its effect to all Survivors within its range. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Prove Thyself at a time.
name: Prove Thyself

description: When performing a Rushed action to vault Pallets or Windows, or to enter or exit Lockers, all noises related to those interactions (and the accompanying Loud Noise Notification) are suppressed. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Quick & Quiet

description: While being chased by the Killer, the Auras of other Survivors are revealed to you and their Repair speed is increased by {percentage}%. Has a cool-down of 40 seconds upon losing a Health State.
name: Quick Gambit

description: Whenever you become afflicted by the Exhausted Status Effect, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 2 seconds. Perform a Rushed action to exit a Locker to voluntarily trigger the Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Cannot be used to override an existing Exhausted Status Effect.
name: Rapid Response

description: Whenever another Survivor within 32 metres of your location loses a Health State while you are in the Injured State, you gain {percentage}% of your missing Healing Progression towards your Health Bar.
name: Reactive Healing

description: While within 6 metres of a hooked Survivor, press the Active Ability button to pause the Sacrifice Process for {duration} seconds (also pausing the Struggle Skill Checks for Survivors in the Struggle Phase) and highlight that Survivor's outline in white. Can only be used once per Survivor per Hook Instance.
name: Reassurance

description: After repairing a Generator for at least 1 second, its Aura is highlighted to you in yellow. The highlight persists until the Generator is completed, you start repairing a different one, or you enter a Locker. Entering a Locker triggers a Loud Noise Notification for the Killer on the highlighted Generator. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds.
name: Red Herring

description: After repairing Generators for a total of {duration} seconds, Repressed Alliance activates. Press the Active Ability button to block the Generator you are currently repairing for 30 seconds, after which it deactivates. The Aura of the blocked Generator is revealed to all Survivors in white. Can only be triggered when no other Survivors are repairing your Generator.
name: Repressed Alliance

description: Whenever you are in the Injured State, your Action speeds for Blessing/Cleansing Totems, Healing, Opening Exit Gates, Repairing Generators, Sabotaging Hooks, Searching Chests, Unhooking other Survivors, and Vaulting Windows are increased by {percentage}%.
name: Resilience

description: After you are unhooked by any means, you gain {percentage}% of Healing progression.
name: Resurgence

description: While injured and repairing a Generator, regular Skill Checks have the following effects: Gain +1 Token for Great Repair Skill Checks. 0 Tokens for Good Repair Skill Checks. Lose -1 Token for Failed Repair Skill Checks. Once you accumulate {tokens} Tokens, consume them all to increase your Healing speed by +100 % until you stop healing. Deactivates after use and does not activate while suffering from the Broken Status Effect. Does not interact with special Skill Checks triggered by outside effects.
name: Road Life

description: While repairing Generators, succeed {value} Good or Great Skill Checks to activate Rookie Spirit for the remainder of the Trial: the Auras of any regressing Generators are revealed to you until they stop regressing.
name: Rookie Spirit

description: While the Killer is carrying another Survivor, the Auras of all Hooks within 56 metres of their original Pick-up location are revealed to you: normal Hooks in white, Scourge Hooks in yellow. Unlocks the ability to sabotage Hooks without Toolboxes: Sabotage speed without a Toolbox is increased by +30 %. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds after use.
name: Saboteur

description: While holding a depleted Toolbox, succeeding Great Repairing Skill Checks grants +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens. Reaching the maximum automatically consumes them and fully recharges the Toolbox, but reduces your Repair speed by -50 % for the next {duration} seconds. Grants the ability to rummage through an opened Chest once per Trial, guaranteeing a basic Toolbox.
name: Scavenger

description: Whenever you are inside the Terror Radius, looking at the Killer causes you to scream, revealing their Aura for {duration} seconds. There is a 50 % chance that you will scream again, extending the Aura-reveal duration by another +2 seconds. Has a cool-down of 40 seconds.
name: Scene Partner

description: When you heal another Survivor for the equivalent of 1 Health State, Second Wind activates. The next time you are unhooked or unhook yourself, you suffer from the Broken Status Effect until Second Wind deactivates. You are automatically healed 1 Health State after {duration} seconds. Deactivated by successfully being healed by Second Wind or entering the Dying State before the timer elapses. Does not activate if you already suffer from Broken.
name: Second Wind

description: Unlocks the Self-Care ability: grants the ability to self-heal without needing a Med-Kit at {percentage}% of the regular Healing speed.
name: Self-Care

description: Whenever another Survivor is hooked, you gain the Elusive Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Self-Preservation

description: Once per Trial, and while you are not on Death Hook, press the Active Ability button while standing in front of a hooked Survivor to unhook them and trade 1 Hook Stage with them to their benefit. You scream and suffer from the Exposed Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Shoulder the Burden

description: Grants +3 additional Self-Unhook attempts during the first Hook Stage. The chance of successfully performing a Self-Unhook is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Slippery Meat

description: Projects an invisible cone in the direction you are looking, with a Detection angle of 45 ° and a range of {range} metres. Triggers an audio cue when detecting any type of Totem within it. Has a cool-down of {duration} seconds after use. Each time a Totem is cleansed, Small Game gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 5 Tokens, reducing the Detection angle of the cone by a stack-able -5 ° per Token, up to a maximum of -25 °.
name: Small Game

description: Whenever you stun the Killer with a Pallet, you gain a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 4 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Smash Hit

description: While injured, healing another Survivor without a Med-Kit grants the ability to passively heal yourself while healing them. Your Personal Healing speed is reduced to {percentage}% of your Altruistic Healing speed.
name: Solidarity

description: Whenever you heal or recover from the Dying State, you gain the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds (cancelled prematurely when performing a Conspicuous Action). Has a cool-down of 30 seconds. While suffering from the Cursed Status Effect, unlocks the Self-Recovery ability (fully recover from the Dying State).
name: Soul Guard

description: Whenever you unlock or rummage through a Chest, Specialist gains +1 Token, up to a maximum of 6 Tokens. Succeeding a Great Repair Skill Check while repairing a Generator consumes all Tokens, permanently reducing the Repair Charges requirement of that Generator by {value} Charges per Token, up to a maximum of {value2} Charges.
name: Specialist

description: Whenever the Killer is within 36 metres of your location and looking at you with a clear Line of Sight, Spine Chill activates: its icon lights up, and your Action speeds for Blessing, Cleansing, Gate-Opening, Healing, Repairing, Sabotaging, Unhooking, and Unlocking are increased by {percentage}%. Lingers for 0.5 seconds after the Killer loses Line of Sight or exits the Activation range.
name: Spine Chill

description: Starting to run grants a +50 % Haste Status Effect for 3 seconds. Cannot be used while Exhausted. Causes the Exhausted Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Sprint Burst

description: Staying in the Terror Radius without being chased grants +1 Token every 15 seconds, up to a maximum of {tokens} Tokens. While performing a skilful interaction, any Good Skill Check is converted into a Great Skill Check, consuming -1 Token. The Progression bonus of those Great Skill Checks is increased by +1 %. Does not apply to regular Great Skill Checks or consume Tokens from them.
name: Stake Out

description: After standing still for {duration} seconds, the Auras of the Killer, Chests, and Generators within 24 metres are revealed to you. Deactivates once you start moving again.
name: Still Sight

description: Any Items with Charges you retrieve from Chests have their Charges permanently increased by {percentage}%. Whenever your currently equipped Item is depleted for the first time, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for 8 seconds.
name: Streetwise

description: Whenever you are inside the Basement, unlocks the Strength in Shadows ability, allowing you to self-heal without needing a Med-Kit at 70 % of the normal Healing speed. Upon finishing a heal in the Basement, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds.
name: Strength in Shadows

description: Whenever another Survivor finishes healing you, both you and the Survivor who healed you have your Scratch Marks suppressed for as long as you stay within {range} metres of one another. Lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering before that timer elapses. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Teamwork: Collective Stealth at a time.
name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth

description: For each Survivor repairing a Generator with you, the size of the good Skill Check zone is increased by {percentage}%. While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair 5 % faster.
name: Teamwork: Full Circuit

description: Whenever you finish healing another Survivor, both you and the healed Survivor gain a +5 % Haste Status Effect for as long as you stay within {range} metres of one another. Lingers for 4 seconds once out of range and resumes upon re-entering before that timer elapses. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Teamwork: Power of Two at a time.
name: Teamwork: Power of Two

description: For each other Survivor repairing a Generator with you, the range at which the Generator's repair noise is heard is reduced by {percentage}%. While repairing with at least 1 other Survivor, you repair 5 % faster.
name: Teamwork: Soft-Spoken

description: Whenever you blind the Killer by any means or stun them using a Pallet, all other injured Survivors within 24 metres of your location gain the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds.
name: Teamwork: Throw Down

description: While injured, whenever another Survivor within 24 metres of your location blinds the Killer by any means or stuns them using a Pallet, your Grunts of Pain, Pools of Blood, and Scratch Marks are suppressed for {duration} seconds.
name: Teamwork: Toughen Up

description: While repairing a Generator, the audible range of all noises related to the Repair interaction is reduced by -8 metres, the Progression penalty incurred when failing a Skill Check is increased by {percentage}%, and the explosion of the Generator and its Loud Noise Notification are suppressed.
name: Technician

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: While in the Dying State, grants the ability to recover while crawling, a {percentage}% Haste Status Effect, reduces the volume of Grunts of Pain by -75 %, and blocks your Aura from being read.
name: Tenacity

description: Whenever you are in the Injured State, the Success zone for a Great Skill Check is increased by {percentage}% for Healing and Repairing interactions.
name: This Is Not Happening

description: When you are chased by the Killer, the Aura of the Generator with the most progress is revealed to you. The Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds after dropping a Pallet. These effects linger for {duration2} seconds after ending the Chase, after which Troubleshooter deactivates.
name: Troubleshooter

description: Whenever you are put in the Dying State by the Killer, your Recovery speed is increased by {percentage}% and the Self-Recovery ability is unlocked, allowing you to fully recover from the Dying State. Can only be used once per Trial.
name: Unbreakable

description: Unlocks the ability to attempt Self-Unhooks during the first Hook Stage for all Survivors. For every Survivor still in the Trial, Up the Ante gains +1 Token: Luck at succeeding Self-Unhook attempts for all Survivors is increased by a stack-able {percentage}% per Token, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%.
name: Up the Ante

description: Your Movement speed while crouched is increased by {percentage}%.
name: Urban Evasion

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: You recover {percentage}% faster from the Blindness, Broken, Exhausted, Exposed, Haemorrhage, Hindered, Mangled, and Oblivious Status Effects. Extends its effect to all Survivors within 16 metres of your location and lingers for 15 seconds after leaving its Area of Effect. Survivors can only be affected by one instance of Vigil at a time.
name: Vigil

description: The Auras of Generators are revealed to you within 32 metres. Temporarily deactivated for {duration} seconds whenever a Generator is completed.
name: Visionary

chapter: CHAPTER 6: A Nightmare on Elm Street
description: Once all Generators are completed, the Auras of the Exit Gate Switches are revealed to you permanently while within 128 metres. Your Aura is revealed to all other Survivors within 128 metres while you are opening an Exit Gate. Your Gate-Opening speed is increased by a stack-able {percentage}% for each Survivor still alive in the Trial, including yourself, up to a maximum of {percentage2}%.
name: Wake Up!

description: After unhooking another Survivor, your Altruistic Healing speed is increased by +100 % for {duration} seconds.
name: We'll Make It

chapter: CHAPTER 5: A Lullaby for the Dark
description: When healing a dying Survivor, your Healing speed is increased by +100 %. Any dying Survivor you heal back to the Injured State gains the Endurance Status Effect for {duration} seconds. Can only be triggered once every 30 seconds.
name: We're Gonna Live Forever

description: Gain +1 Token when the Killer reveals your Aura. When you have 4 Tokens, they are all consumed and the Killer's Aura is revealed to you and all other Survivors for {duration} seconds. Has a 10-second cool-down for gaining Tokens.
name: We See You

description: After you are unhooked by any means, the Aura of the Killer is revealed to you for {duration} seconds. While hooked inside the Basement, Wicked potentially triggers the following: First Hook Stage: 100 % chance to succeed an attempted Self-Unhook. Second Hook Stage: does not trigger. Last Survivor Standing: does not trigger.
name: Wicked

description: The Auras of Breakable Walls, Pallets, and Windows are revealed to you within {range} metres.
name: Windows of Opportunity

description: After repairing a Generator for the equivalent of 40 % of Progression, Wiretap activates. Press the Active Ability button next to a Generator to install a listening device with a countdown of {duration} seconds: reveals the Aura of the Killer coming within 14 metres of the Bugged Generator to all Survivors. Deactivates after its countdown elapses or the Bugged Generator is damaged. The Auras of Bugged Generators are revealed to all Survivors in yellow.
name: Wiretap
